title: Generate SAS program to create SDTM TS (Trial Summary) domain

inputs.prompt: Write a SAS program to create the SDTM TS (Trial Summary) domain dataset. The program must: (1) Read raw trial summary data, (2) Derive USUBJID and TSSEQ (sequential numbering per subject), (3) Map key variables: TSPARMCD, TSPARM, TSVAL, (4) Handle trial summary parameters, study-level metadata extraction, (5) Apply variable attributes per SDTM specification, (6) Create a permanent SAS dataset with xport format. The dataset contains approximately 24 records.
